taxonomy: Pyrrhocactus marayesensis is classified under the family Cactaceae and is a species of flowering plant in the genus Pyrrhocactus. It is native to Bolivia. The genus Pyrrhocactus is part of the subfamily Opuntioideae. The subfamily Opuntioideae is a group of flowering plants within the family Cactaceae. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships between different species within the family Cactaceae.
